# PRIS Beauty

Single-page conversion site prototype for PRIS Beauty in Sri Petaling.

## Run locally

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Project structure

- `index.html`: one-page site markup
- `styles.css`: visual system and responsive layout
- `main.js`: content binding, FAQ rendering, reveal interactions
- `data/site-content.js`: unified content model
- `docs/research.md`: current business and design research
- `docs/content-model.md`: content schema for future growth
- `assets/`: reserved for verified photos, logos, and references
